videos.headline: Louisville takes blocked FG all the way for TD
videos.description: Louisville blocks a field goal and recovers the loose ball, going all the way down the field for a Keyjuan Brown touchdown vs. Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Louisville takes blocked FG all the way for TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Antonio Williams goes full extension for a Clemson TD
videos.description: Cade Clubnik finds Antonio Williams who extends into the end zone to put Clemson ahead vs. Louisville.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Antonio Williams goes full extension for a Clemson TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Louisville DB Benjamin Perry leaves field in neck brace
videos.description: Louisville defensive back Benjamin Perry is stretchered off vs. Clemson after appearing to have sustained a neck-related injury.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Louisville DB Benjamin Perry leaves field in neck brace) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tyler Shough's leaping somersault TD puts Louisville ahead
videos.description: Louisville QB Tyler Shough flees the pocket and somersaults over a defender to take the lead vs. Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tyler Shough's leaping somersault TD puts Louisville ahead) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Louisville blocks 2nd Clemson FG attempt
videos.description: Louisville denies a second field goal attempt by Clemson to keep the score 26-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Louisville blocks 2nd Clemson FG attempt) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Isaac Brown celebrates Louisville TD with 'Night Night' celly
videos.description: Isaac Brown does the "Night Night" celebration in front of the Clemson crowd after his 45-yard run pads Louisville's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Isaac Brown celebrates Louisville TD with 'Night Night' celly) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Phil Mafah walks in late consolation TD for Clemson
videos.description: Phil Mafah walks in late consolation TD for Clemson

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Phil Mafah walks in late consolation TD for Clemson) 2024/11/02 ESHEET
